title: FEATURE REQUEST: Freelancer Portal with customer boards
excerpt: I’m a freelancer. I have many clients and jobs on the go at once. I’d like to be able to set up a folder with project boards in it for each of my clients in my account and that folder also appears in the client’s account…

posts.author: MikeNew (Mike New)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a freelancer. I have many clients and jobs on the go at once. I’d like to be able to set up a folder with project boards in it for each of my clients in my account and that folder also appears in the client’s account.

This has a few benefits.

  1. The client doesn’t need to switch between accounts all the time - annoying.
  2. I can roll up all my different project boards into a dashboard so I can manage my business across all my projects
  3. The client can have their actions in their account all in the one place and not have to juggle between accounts to see their full to do list
